This is a wdspec test.

  AttributeError: 'Storage' object has no attribute 'delete_cookies'
[FAIL] test_default_partition[with set cookie]
  AttributeError: 'Storage' object has no attribute 'delete_cookies'

  AttributeError: 'Storage' object has no attribute 'delete_cookies'

  AttributeError: 'Storage' object has no attribute 'delete_cookies'

  AttributeError: 'Storage' object has no attribute 'delete_cookies'

  AttributeError: 'Storage' object has no attribute 'delete_cookies'

  AttributeError: 'Storage' object has no attribute 'delete_cookies'
